title: Spiesia splendens
taxonomy: Spiesia splendens is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is commonly known as the Spiesia splendens. The plant is native to certain regions in the world and is classified under the genus Spiesia, which is part of the larger legume family. The classification of Spiesia splendens places it within the Fabaceae family and its precise classification is Spiesia splendens (Bunge) Bunge. The species is also known to be closely related to other Spiesia species within the same family.

It is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions, allergies, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots are also used to treat digestive problems and its leaves are used to treat fever. Further research is needed to confirm the medicinal uses of Spiesia splendens specifically.
